name: Jelly Bean Noodle Nests
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a cookie sheet with Pam spray-on cooking oil.
2. Pour the dried Chow mein noodles into a large bowl.
3. Melt the mini marshmallows and butter in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring until smooth.
4. Remove from heat and pour the mixture evenly over the noodles, stirring to coat them well.
5. Rub the remaining butter on your hands, then form the noodle mixture into five round balls.
6. Place the balls on the prepared cookie sheet.
7. Using the back of a spoon, press each ball to create a hollow nest shape.
8. Let the nests firm up slightly before filling each with jelly beans.
Suggested age level: 6 thru adult, but I don't see why a younger child couldn't help with the non-cooking part.
